name: Brunswick Hills Tennis Center
description: Brunswick Hills Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in East Brunswick, NJ. There are 6 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to locker rooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and restrooms. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Buccleuch Park
description: Buccleuch Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New Brunswick, NJ. There are 18 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: The Club at Monroe
description: Why settle for sharing court time when you can have a dedicated space just for pickleball? Welcome to The Club at Monroe, founded by Erica and Mike Rosenberg, a haven for pickleball enthusiasts, Padel & Golf in Central NJ. Located within the Monroe Sports Center complex, our club offers 10 regulation-sized, fenced-in courts in a climate-controlled facility, open 7 days a week. At The Club at Monroe, we cater to all skill levels with clinics, private and group lessons, juniors programs, leagues, tournaments, and open play. Warm up on our convenient dink wall and relax in our spacious social area with ample seating. Our private party room is perfect for hosting birthday parties, corporate events, and private rentals. Our members love the modern, comfortable social areas and the expert advice from our certified, knowledgeable staff. The sense of community and the health benefits of this social sport are at the heart of what we offer. Join today and experience why we're the premier indoor pickleball destination in Monroe.
